ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code for registration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course content */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor assigned to the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for which the assessment is assigned */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., quiz, midterm, final exam) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the assessment in the final grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assessment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who created the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment being taken */,
  "session_number" INTEGER /* Session number indicating the order of assessments */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session is conducted */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who administered the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who completed the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the assessment (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the student's performance */,
  "graded_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who graded the assessment */,
  "graded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assessment was graded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_graded_by FOREIGN KEY ("graded_by") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES assessment_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome (e.g., WRCM, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome type */,
  "grade_scale" TEXT /* Grade scale associated with the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase (e.g., Module 1, Semester 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject (e.g., Mathematics, History) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the subject */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite subjects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result entry */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., raw score, adjusted score) */,
  "score_value" REAL /* The actual score value */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the score */,
  "graded_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who graded the score */,
  "graded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the score was graded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_graded_by FOREIGN KEY ("graded_by") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student completing the session */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phase during which the session occurs */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time taken for the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session is conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the teacher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the teacher */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_courses" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course taught by the teacher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the teacher's assignment to the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the teacher's assignment to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_courses_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, student, instructor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the user has */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
